query:
SELECT id              AS "id!: Uuid",
               name            AS "name!: String",
               completed_at,
               velocity_points AS "velocity_points!: i32"
        FROM   sprints
        WHERE  project_id = $1 AND state = 'completed'
          AND  velocity_points IS NOT NULL
          AND  deleted_at IS NULL
        ORDER  BY completed_at DESC
        LIMIT  10
